items.title: [负面] [strike] 真是绝了，我想请问这忘却篇主线第九章的9-12是怎么设计的？我可以理解这是主线的最...
items.summary:
[strike] 真是绝了，我想请问这忘却篇主线第九章的9-12是怎么设计的？我可以理解这是主线的最后一章的最后一关，boss战想做点演出和剧情对话，问题是在战斗过程中插入了这么多演出就代表着整个战斗要拖的非常久，然而这个战斗难度也没见降低啊。
首先boss战的1阶段要强制拖8个回合，然后进2阶段的前几回合更是压力拉满，一旦鬼抽战斗失败了就是整场战斗重新开打，又得看一遍演出再打一次1阶段，这个过程下来对游玩热情和成就感的消磨都是非常严重的。
如果真想做一个演出boss，那难度就不要搞的太高，保证玩家能一次过连贯地看完剧情，本来第一遍音乐演出文本的配合还挺有氛围的，然后失败了整个重新再打，真是把带入感毁坏殆尽；要是想做高难度就别搞那么多战斗中的文本和演出，在高难度的情况下玩家只会考虑对策和最优解，这个时候插入演出就是土豆炒姜丝，纯属恶心人。建议优化一下忘却篇最后的boss战，甚至就增加个boss转阶段的进度记录观感都能好很多 [/strike]
[h3] 追评：卧槽泥的！后面还有转阶段！狗屎关卡设计师食大份去吧！  [/h3]

items.title: [正面] Succeeds at many parts Reverse 1999 fails at. Also...
items.summary: Succeeds at many parts Reverse 1999 fails at. Also has its own flaws of course like how some people may see a striking similarity between the two and automatically assume one copied the other but its best not to think about that and just enjoy. Also a strong contender for the most generous gacha out there

items.title: [正面] I recommend the game, but it's really sophisticate...
items.summary: I recommend the game, but it's really sophisticated. You have to put a lot of effort into understanding how the characters, teams, and everything else work. Also, if I wanted to know which team was best for a character, I'd have a really hard time finding information. However, it's still a good game... it's simple and easy to play as a F2P

items.title: [正面] Slay the Spire con Gacha, en  español, con buena h...
items.summary: Slay the Spire con Gacha, en  español, con buena historia y una estetica lovecraft que es simplemente impresionante, el juego es extremadamente F2P friendly, llevo menos de 10 horas y ya tengo un team que podria considerarse "de lo mejor del meta" (obviamente mire mil guias de optimizacion) Es una locura que en un gacha algo asi sea posible.... Totalmente recomendado

items.title: [正面] Me encanta este juego, tiene buenos graficos, anim...
items.summary: Me encanta este juego, tiene buenos graficos, animaciones y su jugabilidad es entretenida, ademas es un juego q es muy amable con sus jugadores.

items.title: [正面] It's genuinely fun, relaxing and meditative experi...
items.summary:
It's genuinely fun, relaxing and meditative experience. Music and art are amazing. The characters are interesting.  The aesthetics despite anime style isn't childish, it's more mature and even melancholic. I like it a lot.
It's hard to tell whether he game is F2P viable or no, but as far as I can see, it already offers a lot of gameplay for free as it is. It's definitely worth checking out! I'm not a fan of gatcha, only ever tried lads and dropped it, but this one is genuinely nice.
To those struggling to play on Linux/Steam Deck - try forcing Steam to use Proton GE, it works for me.

items.title:
[正面] One of the best gachas that I've played.

The ga...
items.summary:
One of the best gachas that I've played.

The game features a very generous economy with several ways to grab characters / equipment that you want, even featuring rotating daily banners, rather than the usual weekly / bi-weekly.

The game's story is holding my attention so far. It's leans heavily into Lovecraftian / Cosmic-horror themes. Without diving into spoilers, the story doesn't shy away from killing major characters unlike many other Gachas.

As to the gameplay, it's a roguelite deckbuilder, which features what has been, as of now, actual challenge. The core gameplay is similar to slay the spire, and features vastly different ways to build your team. Some teams might function better against certain bosses than others, but when you hit a difficulty wall, you will feel it. This is overall to the betterment of the game in my opinion, as not enough gachas feature any sort of resistance to the player as an incentive to min-max / buildcraft.

Summarized, it's good. Real good. My second favorite gacha behind Limbus Company as of now. I may update later after I have finished the story.
